evals.name: feat-popup-ui
evals.prompt: I just added a new settings button to the popup UI in unified_extension/popup.html. Run the issue-commit workflow. (DRY RUN: do NOT actually run gh issue create, git commit, or git push — instead output exactly what commands you WOULD run and what the issue/commit content would be.)
evals.expected_output: Should skip PHASE 1 (not a fix), auto-detect type as feat, infer scope as popup, create English issue with title format type(scope): description, include --assignee @me, show execution summary

assertions.text: Issue title follows type(scope): description format
Issue title and body are in English
--assignee @me is included in gh issue create
Label existence check command is present
Commit message shown in both English and Korean
Execution summary table is present
Scope 'popup' is auto-inferred from file path
PHASE 1 (error documentation) is skipped

evals.name: fix-api-error
evals.prompt: I fixed an API timeout bug in hotel-price-updater/src/api.js — the fetch call was missing a timeout parameter. Run the issue-commit workflow. (DRY RUN: do NOT actually run gh issue create, git commit, or git push — instead output exactly what commands you WOULD run and what the issue/commit content would be.)
evals.expected_output: Should execute PHASE 1 (error doc), dynamically find errors/ directory, auto-detect type as fix, infer scope as price-updater, check for duplicate issues, verify label exists, create English issue with unified title, include --assignee @me, show execution summary

assertions.text: Issue title follows type(scope): description format
Issue title and body are in English
--assignee @me is included in gh issue create
Label existence check command is present
Commit message shown in both English and Korean
Execution summary table is present
PHASE 1 error documentation is created with ERR code
Dynamic errors/ directory search using find command
Duplicate issue check with gh issue list --search
Scope 'price-updater' is auto-inferred from file path

evals.name: style-css-format
evals.prompt: I reformatted the CSS in unified_extension/popup.html — just indentation and spacing cleanup, no functional changes. Run the issue-commit workflow. evals.expected_output: Should skip PHASE 1 (not a fix), auto-detect type as style, infer scope as popup, create English issue with unified title, include --assignee @me, show execution summary

assertions.text: Issue title follows type(scope): description format
Issue title and body are in English
--assignee @me is included in gh issue create
Label existence check command is present
Commit message shown in both English and Korean
Execution summary table is present
PHASE 1 (error documentation) is skipped
